datasets.name: Municipal Development Charges
datasets.file: reference/Municipalities & DC's & Prop Taxes for Proforma Testing.xlsx
datasets.notes: 51 municipalities. Rates are City + Region + School (all-in). Pending clarification: Toronto $33,497 vs $34,849; Mississauga waiver status.

datasets.name: Municipal Property Tax Rates
datasets.file: reference/Municipalities & DC's & Prop Taxes for Proforma Testing.xlsx
datasets.notes: 46 municipalities. Uses New Multi-Residential (NT) rate preferred, then MT fallback. 5 municipalities missing tax data.

datasets.name: Altus Construction Cost Guide
datasets.source: Altus Group — Private Sector Construction Cost Database
datasets.notes: Embedded in template Sheet 13. Covers Vancouver, Calgary, Edmonton, Winnipeg, GTA, Ottawa. Updated annually by Altus. When new guide arrives, Noor updates the template sheet. 2026 edition added Edmonton + Winnipeg columns and a PARKING header row, shifting GTA from F/G to J/K and parking rows from 36/37/38 to 40/41/42.

datasets.name: Reverse 1B Template
datasets.notes: 15-sheet financial model. 14-row unit mix expansion on hold (per Noor, 2026-04). Template swaps logged in template_history below.

template_history.source_file: Reverse 1B Master Template Updated - 042826 - V5 - NK fixed.xlsx
template_history.author: Noor Khan
template_history.change: Swapped Altus Cost Guide from 2025 to 2026 edition. Sheet 13 renamed to '13. Altus Cost Guide 26'. Edmonton + Winnipeg columns inserted, shifting GTA from F/G to J/K and Ottawa from H/I to L/M. PARKING header row inserted, shifting parking rows from 36/37/38 to 40/41/42. New row 15 = 'Up to 6 Storey Wood Framed Condo'. F29 fix on V5b vs V5a (was #REF!, now ='13. Altus Cost Guide 26'!A7).
template_history.verified: Same-code V4-vs-V5b regression: Birchmount Sheet 5 O48 $295->$280 (-5.1%), P48 $385->$350 (-9.1%), O49 $175->$165 (-5.7%), P49 $285->$285 (unchanged) — matches Altus 26 GTA 13-39 storey + underground deltas. Headline Numbers move correspondingly: Total Cost -5.0%, Equity Multiple 1.31->1.82, 10-yr IRR 25.2%->31.3%. 490 St Clair: Total Cost -5.4%, Construction PSF -5.4%, 10-yr IRR 37.1%->39.0%. Validator 66/66 on Birchmount and 490 St Clair. Surface parking targeted assertion: 1911 North Routledge writes O49=Altus 26!J40, P49=K40 (was J38/G38 in V4 = Altus 25 underground default for that pre-fix code path). LibreOffice headless recalc clean — no #REF!/#VALUE!/#NAME?.

template_history.source_file: Reverse 1B Master Template Updated - 041626 - V4 - NK.xlsx
template_history.author: Noor Khan
template_history.change: Added Equity Multiple KPI on Sheet 3 row 40 (=G34/'2. Rev 1B Exec Summary'!G53). Rows 40-45 shifted down by 1. Sheet 5 F104 pointer updated G40->G41 to follow 10-year IRR. Sheet 15 unchanged.
template_history.verified: Same-code V3-vs-V4 regression = identical numerics. Validator 66/66 on Birchmount and 490 St Clair. Live on Railway, C40 confirmed = 'Equity Multiple'.

datasets.name: Operating Expense Defaults
datasets.notes: Hardcoded defaults: R&M $1,050, Staffing $1,200, Insurance $450, Marketing $300, G&A $250, Utilities $11/PSF, Reserve 2%. Noor reviews annually.

datasets.name: Building Area Estimation Rules
datasets.notes: GFA efficiency 0.88, amenity 22 SF/unit, parking 350 SF/space. Based on Birchmount proportions. Update if Noor provides better benchmarks.

datasets.name: CMHC Rental Market Report
datasets.notes: NOT YET INTEGRATED. CMHC publishes annually (October). Rental data currently comes from the client's 1A proforma, not from CMHC directly. Placeholder for Phase 2.
